title: Build CSV upload parse normalize and staging pipeline
acceptance_criteria: Upload route/server action parses CSV safely with file-size guardrails
Rows are normalized and validated before staging
User must map import to one owned account before staging persists
Unit tests cover parse failures and successful staging path
deliverables: CSV import processing route or server action
tests for parsing and staging behavior
completion_summary: Implemented CSV upload staging pipeline with guardrails, normalization, account-ownership checks, and unit tests for parse failure and successful staging.
